title: peucedanum neapolitanum
intro: Peucedanum neapolitanum, also known as Naples meadow parsley or Neapolitan carrot-root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Peucedanum neapolitanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Peucedanum neapolitanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
